Name: Westlake Chemical Corporation
Description: Westlake Chemical Corporation (WLK) is a prominent global leader in the manufacturing and supply of petrochemicals, polymers, and fabricated products, catering to essential industries such as construction, automotive, and packaging. The company operates through distinct segments—Olefins and Vinyls—enabling it to effectively leverage global economic trends and rising product demand. Committed to sustainability, Westlake actively invests in innovative technologies aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and reducing environmental impact. With a robust manufacturing presence in North America and Europe, coupled with a disciplined financial management approach, Westlake is well-positioned for sustained growth and increased shareholder value.
Address: 2801 POST OAK BOULEVARD, HOUSTON, TX, UNITED STATES, 77056
